page_content:
BSC1422 Principles of Immunology (3 Credits)

The immune system in health and disease. Presentation and analysis of the cellular and molecular processes that comprise the immune system. Prerequisite: BSCI222.

Recommended: BSCI330; and (BSCI223 or BSC1I283).

Restriction: Junior standing or higher.

BSC1I423 Immunology Laboratory (2 Credits)

Current techniques for assessment of immune status and evaluation of the immune response, including monoclonal antibody production, Western blotting, cytokine assays, ELISA and flow cytometry. Prerequisite: BSCI222.
